ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the subscription */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product or service being subscribed to */,
  "pricing_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing plan associated with the subscription */,
  "subs_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription tag */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive, trial) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is set to renew */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription will auto-renew */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was canceled (if applicable) */,
  "trial_end_date" TEXT /* Date the trial period ends */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Duration of the billing cycle (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_pricing_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_subs_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("subs_tag_id") REFERENCES subs_tags ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product or service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product or service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., software, hardware) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_plans" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the pricing plan */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Trial period for the pricing plan */,
  "billing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of billing (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "features" TEXT /* JSON array of features included in the pricing plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pricing plan was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pricing plan information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pricing plan is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subs_tags" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the discount becomes available */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the discount expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the discount was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the discount information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the discount is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_discounts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription discount */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the discount is applied to */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount being applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the discount was applied to the subscription */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the discount information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_discounts_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_tags" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription tag */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the tag is applied to */,
  "subs_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was applied to the subscription */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_tags_subs_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("subs_tag_id") REFERENCES subs_tags ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_tags_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid, overdue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., active days, revenue) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_metrics_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_notes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the note is for */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_notes_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("id")
)
